2023-05-25T09:42:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , the fast lane of Lung Cheung Road flyover (Kwun Tong bound) near Ping Shek Estate is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-05-25T09:42:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，龍翔道天橋(往觀塘方向)近坪石邨的快線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-05-25T09:49:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , the fast lane of Lung Cheung Road flyover (Kwun Tong bound) near Ping Shek Estate is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road flyover (Kwun Tong bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Po Kong Village Road.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-05-25T09:49:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，龍翔道天橋(往觀塘方向)近坪石邨的快線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在龍翔道天橋(往觀塘方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍翔道近蒲崗村道。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-05-25T09:54:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Lung Cheung Road flyover (Kwun Tong bound) near Ping Shek Estate which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T09:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道天橋(往觀塘方向)近坪石邨的快線現已解封。

2023-05-25T10:31:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Lantau Link (Tsing Ma Bridge) (Airport bound) near Ma Wan which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2023-05-25T10:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的青嶼幹線(青馬大橋)(往機場方向) 近馬灣的快線現已解封。車龍有待消散。

2023-05-25T10:37:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Ka Loon Tsuen which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T10:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近嘉龍村的部份行車線現已解封。

2023-05-25T12:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Kwong Cheung Street  is closed to all traffic.
2023-05-25T12:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，光昌街的全線現已封閉。

2023-05-25T12:56:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of Kwong Cheung Street  which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-05-25T12:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的光昌街的全線現已解封。
